validation_summary.evidence: python -m py_compile on 3 changed/new Python files exits 0 (~0.1s); python -m unittest skills.development-harness.scripts.tests.test_continue_loop_claude -v passes 9/9 (0.7s); python -m unittest skills.development-harness.scripts.tests.test_claude_code_continuation_docs -v passes 12/12 (0.004s); python -m unittest discover skills/development-harness/scripts/tests passes 243/244 with 1 OS-specific skip (38.7s, up from 228 -- 16 new cases + 9 rewritten cases for unit_bugfix_002)

checkpoint.summary: unit_bugfix_002 complete. ISSUE_002 RESOLVED. All four sub-edits landed in one commit. (a) New references/claude-code-continuation.md documents the protocol mismatch (Cursor's followup_message has no guard; Claude Code's stop_hook_active is a one-shot that persists for the session + built-in loop-guard floor) and the two-track fix (Claude Code precondition-only + /loop, Cursor unchanged). (b) templates/claude-code/hooks/continue-loop.py rewritten to precondition-only shape: same authority chain (fleet.mode, loop_budget, blockers, open_questions, selector+checkpoint agreement) but outputs a single-line advisory ('proceed: <unit> in <phase>' or 'stop: <reason>'), ALWAYS exits 0, cleans up .invoke-active + .parallel-disabled + .parallel-failures.jsonl on every path. No more sys.exit(2), no more {'decision': 'block'} JSON. The stop_hook_active input is read but unused -- in precondition mode there is nothing to guard against. (c) commands/invoke.md + templates/workspace-commands/invoke-development-harness.md both gained 'Claude Code: run under /loop' sections pointing users at '/loop /invoke-development-harness' with explicit 'one batch per turn' framing on direct invocation and 'Cursor is unchanged' reassurance. (d) commands/create.md Phase 5 Claude Code branch now preambles the JSON with the hook's precondition-checker role description + 'does NOT emit {'decision': 'block'} or exit(2)' negating callout + link to the new reference. Cursor side is diff-zero. 16 new test cases + 9 rewritten: test_continue_loop_claude.py flipped from block-continue contract to precondition-only (4 fleet cases + 2 full-chain proceed cases + 1 flag-absent no-op + 2 budget/blockers cases); new test_claude_code_continuation_docs.py pins the doc-shape contract at 12 cases across 3 classes. Pre-existing test_safety_rails.py TestHookStopClearsSafetyRails still passes -- the cleanup behavior is preserved. ISSUE_002.json flipped to resolved. state.json issues counter: total 2, open 0, resolved 2. Suite 228 -> 244.
